problem id: 2fed9ceb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  00010001 -> 00100110
  00110110 -> 01101101
  00101111 -> 01011111
  01110100 -> 11111101
  11111011 -> 11111111
  01011111 -> 10111111
  10001010 -> 00110111
  01001111 -> 10011111

query: 11100100
predicted answer: 11111001
